dashboard.description: AIOps Operational Overview — CPU, RAM, Disk, Containers, API Latency, DB, Network. Tuned for 2-server setup (Hetzner CPX51 + Hostinger VPS).

panels.title: SYSTEM RESOURCES — Hetzner CPX51 (16 vCPU, 32GB, 360GB NVMe) vs Hostinger VPS (4-8 vCPU, 8-16GB)

panels.description: Current CPU utilization for both servers
panels.title: CPU Usage % (5m avg)

panels.description: Disk usage for root filesystem on both servers
panels.title: Disk Usage % (Root FS)

panels.description: System load average (1m, 5m, 15m) — shows CPU demand trend
panels.title: System Load Average

panels.description: Shows which containers are currently running (green) or down (red) on both servers
panels.title: Container Count (Running / Total)

panels.description: Per-container uptime — red means container is down
panels.title: Container Last Seen (seconds ago — green=healthy, red=down)
API RESPONSE TIMES (Traefik — p50, p95, p99)

panels.description: P50 response time per router — typical user experience
panels.title: P50 Response Time (Hetzner Traefik)

panels.description: P95 response time — slowest 5% of requests. Alert at >2s.
panels.title: P95 Response Time (Hetzner Traefik)

panels.description: P99 response time — worst case latency for 1% of requests
panels.title: P99 Response Time (Hetzner Traefik)
DATABASE METRICS — Postgres Connections & Query Latency

panels.description: Query latency (average block read time) per database
panels.title: Postgres Block Read Latency (5m avg)
QUEUE DEPTHS & WORKER METRICS (Application — requires custom metrics)

panels.description: Worker queue depth metrics (requires app to expose custom metric). Panels are placeholder-ready for: prediction_radar_queue_depth, ravynai_queue_depth, trading_queue_depth, nats_queue_depth
panels.title: Worker Queue Depths (custom metrics — shown when exposed by apps)

dashboard.title: AIOps Overview
